description: A hydrology research group requires a comparison of two distinct precipitation regimes (Amazon Basin vs. Eastern Mediterranean) for a dissertation figure. Using the NCEP precipitation rate dataset (~/PanoplyData/prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc) and the assignment details in ~/Desktop/precip_regime_assignment.txt, generate 12-month annual cycle line plots for the Amazon Basin (lat ≈ -3, lon ≈ 300) and the Eastern Mediterranean (lat ≈ 38, lon ≈ 20). Export the Amazon plot to ~/Documents/PrecipRegimes/amazon_annual_precip.png and the Mediterranean plot to ~/Documents/PrecipRegimes/mediterranean_annual_precip.png. Complete the structured comparison report at ~/Documents/PrecipRegimes/regime_comparison_report.txt using the fields specified in the assignment.
